summary: Frontend UI testing completed for 4-column layout UI changes. Tested analytics modal structure, task creation dialogs with color presets, calendar sizing, and icon/checkbox styling. Most features pass with minor observation.
passed_tests: 4-column layout displays correctly: ПОДІЇ, КАСЯ, КАРОЛІНА, ВО
КАСЯ + button opens SMM task dialog with emerald color pre-selected
КАРОЛІНА + button opens regular task dialog with black color pre-selected
ВО + button opens SMM task dialog with black color pre-selected
Task creation dialog shows 4 color circles without text labels: black, red, purple, emerald
Date field and 4 color buttons appear in the same row in dialogs
All task icons (26 found) are BLACK - no colored classes (emerald/red/orange)
All task checkboxes (26 found) are BLACK - no colored classes
Analytics modal has ТИЖДЕНЬ/МІСЯЦЬ filters in header left area
Analytics modal has navigation arrows (< prev / next >) in header left
Analytics modal has close X button in header right area
Analytics modal has ESC hint text '— або ESC щоб закрити' in header right
Analytics modal displays 3 metric types: збс (green), опіздали (orange), пупупу (red)
Analytics modal shows 4 columns: ПОДІЇ, КАСЯ, КАРОЛІНА, ВО
Calendar in events column uses compact sizing (calendar-container-desktop CSS applied)
critical_code_review_comments: SMMTaskItem at line ~440 correctly renders task-icon and task-checkbox without color classes - all icons/checkboxes are now black regardless of task color
StatsContent at line ~3795 renders its own header with filters (ТИЖДЕНЬ/МІСЯЦЬ) on left and close button with ESC hint on right - no title present
Task dialogs (showTaskDialog line ~2883, showSMMTaskDialog line ~3088) both use ring-2 ring-offset-2 CSS for selected color indication
TeamColumn onAddClick handlers correctly set color presets: КАСЯ='kasya', КАРОЛІНА='karolina', ВО='karolina'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing events and tasks
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI changes verified: 1) Analytics modal has no title, filters (ТИЖДЕНЬ/МІСЯЦЬ + arrows) in header left, close X with ESC hint in header right. 2) All task icons/checkboxes are black - no colored classes. 3) Task creation dialogs have date + 4 color circles (no labels) in one row. 4) Each column's + button pre-selects correct color: КАСЯ=emerald, КАРОЛІНА=black, ВО=black. 5) Analytics shows 3 metrics: збс (green), опіздали (orange), пупупу (red).
